description: Taking traditional designs and giving them a modern twist is what makes fastrack watches irreplaceable timepieces. This watch refuses to conform, with its stylish dial and minimalist design, backed up by a steel case for optimal performance. Wear this with trendy, casual ensembles - colour-pop tees, denims and sports shoes. Case diameter: 38 mm Case thickness: 8 mm Dial shape: Round Steel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Rubber strap with an embossed design and a tang clasp for comfort and style Black, white and yellow dial with branding at the 6 hour mark and brand logo at the 12 hour mark Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering
